allow: Bash(python -c " import sys, json d = json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\) if not d.get\('ok'\): print\('ERROR:', d.get\('error'\)\) sys.exit\(1\) r = d.get\('report', {}\) print\('sources:', r.get\('sources'\)\) c = r.get\('confidence', {}\) print\('confidence level:', c.get\('level'\)\) print\('confidence score:', c.get\('score'\)\) "2)
